title: epiluma pyriformis
intro: Epiluma pyriformis, also known as Epilobium pyriformis, is a flowering plant species belonging to the willowherb family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is said to have several health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, Epilobium pyriformis is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to support urinary tract health and alleviate menstrual cramps.
